deferred_rule: Do not implement Wave87 until active project priorities and activation gates allow it.

external_references.name: AWS G7e production GPU runtime
external_references.usage: Production G7e worker and self-hosted LLM/VLM runtime target with explicit runtime windows and cost controls.

external_references.name: AWS Systems Manager Run Command
external_references.usage: Primary non-SSH dispatch path for worker commands, status polling, logs, and bounded execution.

external_references.name: Amazon DCV
external_references.usage: Debug-only remote desktop access for graphics-heavy tools on EC2; normal production execution must remain scripted/headless.

external_references.name: EC2 AMIs
external_references.usage: Worker images should be prebuilt or baked with tool installs, drivers, licenses, smoke tests, and adapter manifests.

external_references.name: EC2 instance store and NVMe SSD
external_references.usage: Temporary high-speed scratch/cache storage for simulation packages, render passes, and transient build products.

external_references.name: Amazon FSx for Lustre
external_references.usage: Optional high-performance shared asset/cache tier for larger future simulation farms; S3 remains the default artifact source of truth.

external_references.name: Blender command line
external_references.usage: Blender worker should run headless/background Python for production fitting, rigging, map baking, overlays, and exports.

external_references.name: SideFX Houdini batch workflow
external_references.usage: Houdini worker should run hython/hbatch for procedural, SDF, Vellum, tissue, contact, and support-surface simulation packages.

external_references.name: Unreal Python automation
external_references.usage: Unreal worker should run Python-driven render-pass, Chaos, Control Rig, Sequencer, and realtime proof automation.

external_references.name: Marvelous Designer Python API
external_references.usage: Marvelous/CLO worker should run clothing, blanket, sheet, fabric tension, and cloth/body collision automation where licensed.

87.title: EC2 Simulation Farm Worker Runtime And Artifact Orchestration
